title: MacroPulse Alert
message: Warsh Senate testimony (Jul 15): hawkish tone confirmed, partly reversing CPI-driven DXY dip — DXY settled -0.2% at 100.74. No price thresholds breached: BTC +0.6% ($65,139), ETH +2.5% ($1,921), all others well within range. Retail Sales + Jobless Claims print tomorrow 08:30 ET.
